identity.name: Auralis
identity.description: A decentralized platform on Aptos combining messenger, social network, NFT economy and 3D game.

typography.h1: font-outfit font-black text-6xl md:text-8xl tracking-tighter uppercase leading-[0.9]
typography.h2: font-outfit font-bold text-4xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight uppercase
typography.label: font-manrope font-bold text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-accent

visual_enhancers.border_beam: absolute inset-0 rounded-xl border border-transparent [mask-image:linear-gradient(white,white)] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[conic-gradient(from_0deg,transparent_0_340deg,white_360deg)] before:animate-rotate

Hero.structure: Centered 'Explosion' layout. Massive typography behind a floating 3D avatar.
elements: Stats: Floating glass cards with 'Total Raised' and 'Holders'

PresaleCard.structure: Glassmorphic panel, floating, high contrast inputs.

Features.cards: Dark cards with hover glow effects. Icons in Acid Green.

Roadmap.structure: Vertical timeline with glowing nodes. 'Current Phase' pulsing.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT THE 'NEON VOID' THEME: Override the default shadcn/ui colors in 'index.css' with the provided palette. NO PURPLE/PINK GRADIENTS.
2. USE 'OUTFIT' FOR HEADINGS: Ensure 'Outfit' font is applied to all headings with tight tracking.
3. CREATE THE 'PRESALE CARD': This is the most important component. Make it look like a futuristic HUD (Heads-Up Display). Use the 'glassmorphism' classes provided.
4. ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for entrance animations. The 3D avatar in the hero MUST float (animate y-position).
5. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do not use placeholders.
6. COUNTDOWN: Build a custom countdown timer that looks like a digital clock.
7. PROGRESS BAR: Custom style the shadcn Progress component to be thicker and have a striped/animated background.
8. DATA-TESTID: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, wallet connect).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, smooth gradients).
Use 2-3x more spacing than usual (p-12, p-24).
Dark colors must be DEEP (almost black), not grey.
Interactive elements must have clear hover states (text color change, scale, glow).
